title: ConsentGrant
description: Explicit consent record for a single lead submission. Required whenever a `lead.*` AAP request payload (carried inside an A2A DataPart) includes customer contact info. Provides an auditable record of what the user authorized, when, and through which channels. A dealer agent MUST reject lead submissions with `CONTACT_CONSENT_REQUIRED` if a requested contact channel is not permitted by this grant.

granted_at.description: Timestamp at which the user authorized this share.

allowed_channels.description: Channels the user has authorized the dealer to use for follow-up.

consent_text.description: Verbatim text the user agreed to (e.g. the disclosure shown by the buyer agent).

source_agent.description: Identifier of the buyer agent that captured the consent (e.g. 'chatgpt-shopping', 'gemini-assistant', 'lumika-bdc').

scope.description: Scope of the consent. 'vehicle_inquiry' covers lead.vehicle, 'appointment' covers lead.appointment, 'general_inquiry' covers lead.general.
